claims.text: AI research communities show 83% homophily between safety and ethics subfields.

candidate_evidence.description: Roytburg & Miller, 'Mind the Gap!' — Figure 1 caption states 83.1% homophily.

claims.text: DeepSeek V3, trained with GRPO, was among the most sycophantic models tested.

queries.text: What is the current state of AI watermarking technology for detecting AI-generated text?

axioms.text: This research is conducted in the context of consumer AI products, not classified military systems.
